summary: Comprehensive testing of Intake Questions feature (brand new). Backend: 20/20 tests pass. Admin UI: all intake schema builder interactions work correctly. Customer product page: intake section renders and Add to Cart merges intake answers correctly. One pre-existing bug found in admin catalog pagination.

issues: PRE-EXISTING: Admin catalog calls /api/admin/products-all without per_page param (defaults to 20). With 42+ products, only first 20 are loaded. Client-side search/filter only works on those 20. Products beyond page 1 (e.g., 'Intake Test Updated') are invisible. Subtitle incorrectly shows '20 products' instead of total 42. Fix: pass per_page=1000 or implement server-side search in ProductsTab.tsx API call.

critical_code_review_comments: ProductsTab.tsx: api.get('/admin/products-all') doesn't specify per_page, defaulting to 20. With 42+ products, admin cannot search/find products on page 2+. Fix: use per_page=1000 or implement server-side search.
The admin catalog subtitle shows '20 products' (loaded count) not total (42+). Misleading to admin users.
Both issues are pre-existing, not related to the new intake schema feature.
action_items: Fix admin catalog pagination: in ProductsTab.tsx line 74, change `api.get('/admin/products-all')` to `api.get('/admin/products-all?per_page=200')` to load all products (currently only loads first 20 of 42+ products, making any product on page 2+ invisible and unsearchable in admin UI).

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all intake feature flows work correctly

seed_data_creation: Backend test updated product fc5d2e93-4adc-4db8-9ac9-f4df3e416e7a to version 4 (company_size dropdown with 1-10/11-50/50+ options, required=true). Admin UI test added intake questions to 'Data Migration to Zoho CRM' product (first visible product in catalog).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intake schema feature fully tested and working. Backend 20/20 pass. The test product fc5d2e93-4adc-4db8-9ac9-f4df3e416e7a (Intake Test Updated) has company_size dropdown at version 4. Main known issue: admin catalog only loads first 20 products (pre-existing), so Intake Test Updated is not visible in admin catalog search (it's on page 2 of API). Admin UI was tested using first visible product instead. Customer page and Add to Cart intake flow work perfectly.
rca_of_issue: Admin catalog pagination bug: ProductsTab.tsx calls api.get('/admin/products-all') with no per_page param. Backend defaults to per_page=20. With 42+ products, only first 20 are returned. Frontend does client-side pagination on those 20 items. Products on page 2+ (including 'Intake Test Updated') are invisible to admin. Fix: add per_page=200 or similar large value in the API call on line 74 of ProductsTab.tsx.
